vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base plate with mounting holes, leveling, and cable entry
Fixed BOM item inside 6-DOF Industrial Arm
Cleanroom semiconductor handling, ESD-safe, particle-free joint seals

verify.rule: All required fields and structures are present.
Mass estimation is provided and plausible for the subsystem.
All P0 internal_feature_targets appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Adjacent interfaces and mounting datums are named with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
Critical joints have visible locking method and preload evidence.
Boundary conditions are defined for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential material fatigue due to cyclic loading on the base plate.
risk.mit: Conduct fatigue analysis and consider material upgrades if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to insufficient strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have proper strain relief geometry.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear alignment features.
risk.mit: Add alignment features such as datum pads and alignment pins.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to poor heat dissipation from the harmonic drive.
risk.mit: Optimize thermal fins and consider additional cooling methods.

risk.desc: Risk of ESD damage due to lack of proper ESD protection.
risk.mit: Implement ESD-safe materials and design features.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base plate with mounting holes, leveling, and cable entry

physics_paths.description: Mounting flange transfers payload and structural loads to base plate.
Electrical cables pass through grommet to service arm base.
Heat from harmonic drive dissipates through base plate to ambient.
Rotation of base joint drives motion of first link.
Human access for maintenance and inspection of base joint.

verification_focus.description: Verify base plate can withstand payload and structural loads.
Verify mounting holes align with mounting plate.
Verify cable entry grommet provides strain relief.
Verify harmonic drive enclosure dissipates heat effectively.
Verify leveling screws adjust base plate level.
